response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (31%) is above our minimum reserve threshold (25%), and our islanded state with critical load sustainability requires preserving all available capacity for internal stability rather than outbound sharing at this time.

user:

Your latest belief: Islanded with critically low SoC (31%); 1.0 kW load unsustainable for >30 min. All peers rejecting normal-priority requests due to their own stress. Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
